description: Calculate the Floor Area Ratio (FAR) across San Francisco to identify underbuilt "soft sites" with redevelopment potential using the Jupyter notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/soft_site_analysis.ipynb. Using the 'buildings' and 'parcels' tables from /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5, identify soft sites defined as parcels with a 'parcel_sqft' >= 5000 and an 'existing_far' (total building sqft / parcel sqft, treating parcels without buildings as 0 sqft) between 0.01 and 0.5. Aggregate these sites by 'zone_id' to determine the 'soft_site_count' and 'total_soft_site_sqft'. Export the top 20 zones by 'total_soft_site_sqft' to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/top_soft_sites.csv with columns for zone_id, soft_site_count, and total_soft_site_sqft. Save a bar chart of the 'total_soft_site_sqft' for these zones to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/soft_sites_chart.png and export a JSON summary to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/soft_sites_summary.json containing 'total_soft_sites_citywide', 'total_soft_site_sqft_citywide', and the 'top_zone_id'. The notebook must be fully executed.
